IF NProcesa=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 74, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado74 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 75, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado75 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 73, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado74=0 AND nEstado75=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado74=1 AND nEstado75=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado74=1 OR nEstado75=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
nEstado is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 72, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado=1 THEN

ELSE IF nEstado=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
